title: arabis holboellii var. retrofracta
intro: Arabis holboellii var. retrofracta, also known as Rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Arabis holboellii var. retrofracta can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken orally, or applied topically to the affected area.
